candidate_summary: Rank-based 2-tier access control modeled on Hawaiian kapu-noa system with mana spiritual-power gradient, default-deny sacred zones, ritual-mediated permission grants, and reputation penalties for violation.
content_words: hawaiian kapu noa sacred prohibition aliʻi makaʻāinana
mana spiritual power rank-based 2-tier chief commoner
ancestral gods sacred secular boundary divinity
2-tier role hierarchy R_2 aliʻi-high-mana-trusted vs makaʻāinana-low-mana-standard
kapu-zones default-deny noa-zones default-allow sensitive-vs-public partition
ai-noa ritual-breaking explicit permission-grant multi-step + mana-theft reputation penalty

results.name: LLM Access Control TrueFoundry
results.rationale: Generic LLM access control product; lacks 2-tier role hierarchy with continuous mana-style gradient or ritual-mediated permission elevation.

results.name: Personalized Access Control 2511.20284
results.rationale: Per-user personalization differs from rank-based 2-tier structure. No mana-gradient continuous score, no ritual-breaking multi-step authentication, no reputation penalty.

results.name: Least-Privilege Language Models
results.rationale: Least-privilege aligns weakly with kapu default-deny but lacks 2-tier rank hierarchy, continuous spiritual-power gradient, ritual elevation, and reputation theft penalty.

results.name: Vision Access Control LLM-Agent 2510.11108
results.rationale: Vision-modal access control; orthogonal domain. No rank-tier, no mana-gradient, no ritual-mediated authentication.

results.name: Snowflake RBAC Cortex LLM 2025
results.rationale: RBAC role-based access control matches 2-tier role hierarchy keyword. kw_count>=2 forces hit. However lacks continuous mana-gradient, ritual-breaking multi-step elevation, and mana-theft reputation penalty.

results.name: LLMAC Global Explainable Access Control 2602.09392
results.rationale: Global explainability orthogonal to rank-tier mana-gradient. No 2-tier ali'i/maka'āinana structure, no ai-noa ritual elevation.

results.name: LLM ABAC Policy Mining 2511.18098
results.rationale: ABAC attribute-based differs from rank-based 2-tier with continuous mana gradient. Policy mining vs ritual-mediated explicit elevation.

results.name: Privilege Escalation LLM-Agent 2601.11893
results.rationale: Privilege escalation as attack surface, not as ritual-mediated legitimate elevation pathway.

decision_rationale: Only 1/8 results triggers hit (Snowflake RBAC via kw>=2). Candidate's distinctive elements not present in retrieved results. Verifier verdict FAIL agrees with primary (verdict-level agreement); primary 8 hits broader, verifier 1 hit per-paper stricter.
